flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Bastyr University are 22% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($49.4k vs $63.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bastyr University fell 42% between 2021 and 2024 (67 → 39).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bastyr University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bastyr University fell 31% between 2017 and 2020 ($20.0k → $13.8k).
